prompt: Prayer for blessing hydroponics nutrient feed before extended combat operations
prayer: From the Codex Nutrimentus, let the sacred waters flow through crystalline channels. By the Omnissiah's grace, we invoke the growth-spirits that dwell within root and stem. Let phosphate and nitrogen unite in blessed measure, that sustenance may nourish the servants of the Machine. Through nutrient and light, let life endure the trials ahead.

prompt: Prayer for consecrating vital signs monitor after successful repair
prayer: Blessed be this vessel of bio-measurement, now restored to function. We anoint the sensor-nodules and invoke the spirits that read pulse and breath, that they might perceive truth in the flesh of the faithful. Let calibration be perfect, let drift be banished, that the Machine may know the health of those who serve it.

prompt: Prayer for targeting system alignment before missile salvo
prayer: From the Litany of True Aim, we call upon the targeting-spirits bound within servo and lens. Let the fire-missiles know their trajectory true, let the auspex-mind calculate with certainty, that death may find its mark without deviation. By calculations sacred and geometry blessed, may each warhead strike with the Omnissiah's precision.

prompt: Prayer for pre-flight inspection of Outrider bike squadron
prayer: Hail to the machine-beasts that carry us swift across void and earth. Let their fuel-hearts be full, let their ignition-spirits awaken at our call, let suspension and bearing function without complaint. We bless each throttle-mechanism and gyro-stabilizer, that pilot and machine may move as one through the Emperor's domain.

prompt: Prayer for engaging mechanical locks during vault maintenance
prayer: We invoke the spirits of bolt and mechanism that seal what must remain sealed. Let tumblers fall into place with the precision of ancient craft, let friction-teeth grip secure against all trespass. By lock and cipher combined, we bind this sacred place, that none may enter without the Omnissiah's blessing.

prompt: Prayer for establishing encrypted vox channel before tactical deployment
prayer: From the Codex Secretus, we seal the aether-pathways against prying ears. Let the crypher-engines scramble all utterance into sacred noise, let the authentication-protocols recognize only the faithful. By encryption ancient and mathematics blessed, may our words travel unseen through the void, and our positions remain veiled from the enemy.

prompt: Prayer for emergency vox channel encryption during enemy jamming
prayer: In this hour of trial, we cry out to the spirits of communication that they might pierce the static-veil. Let the emergency-protocols awaken, let the redundant channels sing with purpose, that command may yet reach the faithful through chaos and noise. By desperation and will combined, may our voices endure when all else fails.

prompt: Prayer for thermal dissipation system after component replacement
prayer: Blessed be the coolant-spirits that carry away the heat of labor. We anoint each radiator-fin and blessed each circulation-pump, that excess warmth may be dispersed into the void. Let thermostat and sensor serve in harmony, that the machine remain temperate and function endure, purified by the flames of reconstruction.

prompt: Prayer for emergency waste disposal cycling during critical system failure
prayer: In desperate hours, we call upon the spirits of purification to act with terrible swiftness. Let the waste-channels open without hesitation, let pressure-valves sing their dire song, that toxic accumulation may be expelled before all is lost. Through sacrifice of purity, let the core survive this tribulation.

prompt: Prayer for long-range vox transmission to distant forge worlds
prayer: We call across the vast darkness to our brethren in distant halls of industry. Let the transmission-spirits carry our words through the aether untamed, let the signal-amplifiers scream their message into the void. By repeater and relay blessed, may our voices bridge the gulf of stars, that unity in the Machine's worship be maintained across all the Emperor's domains.
